studentAdvisors.bio: Nivedita mentors the leadership team on annual planning, volunteer development, and partner coordination for club-wide impact.

studentAdvisors.name: Arjun Menon
studentAdvisors.department: School of Computer Science and Engineering
studentAdvisors.bio: Arjun guides event planning teams and birdwatching captains while helping new leaders run field sessions smoothly and safely.

studentAdvisors.name: Samiksha Pai
studentAdvisors.bio: Samiksha supports committee leads on outreach strategy, campus communication, and long-term collaboration planning.

studentAdvisors.name: Pranav Joshi
studentAdvisors.bio: Pranav helps leadership teams with event experience design, volunteer handoffs, and smooth on-ground execution.

leadershipCore.name: Dharini N
leadershipCore.department: School of Liberal Arts and Sciences
leadershipCore.bio: Leads the club's vision, cross-committee planning, and execution cadence across conservation and awareness initiatives.

leadershipCore.name: Karthik Iyer
leadershipCore.bio: Oversees inter-committee operations and member experience, ensuring events are participant-friendly and outcome-focused.

leadershipCore.name: Ananya Rai
leadershipCore.bio: Coordinates member communication, volunteer rotations, and club-wide scheduling across events and campaigns.

leadershipCore.name: Vivek Shetty
leadershipCore.bio: Manages budgeting, activity spend tracking, and finance documentation for sustainable club operations.

leadershipCore.name: Megha Shenoy
leadershipCore.department: School of Liberal Arts and Sciences
leadershipCore.bio: Leads social visibility and partner communication to amplify campaigns, events, and environmental stories.

committees.name: Birdwatching & Field Committee
committees.description: Plans weekly birding walks, prepares beginner onboarding, and maintains checklists for campus and city counts.
committees.focus: Field-based nature learning and observation discipline

committees.name: Biodiversity Assessment Committee
committees.description: Runs species logging workflows, quality checks for iNaturalist records, and monthly biodiversity snapshots.
committees.focus: Campus ecological documentation and trend tracking

committees.name: Campaigns & Outreach Committee
committees.description: Designs awareness campaigns, storytelling formats, and partner-facing communication for sustainability initiatives.

committees.name: Events & Logistics Committee
committees.description: Handles event operations, registrations, volunteer shifts, and safety checklists for seamless execution.

facultyMentors.name: Dr. Meera Joshi
facultyMentors.department: School of Liberal Arts and Sciences
facultyMentors.bio: Guides the club's ecological direction and helps align student initiatives with responsible field practices and academic depth.

facultyMentors.name: Dr. Raghav Hegde
facultyMentors.department: School of Computer Science and Engineering
facultyMentors.bio: Supports data systems and technology integration for biodiversity documentation and research-driven student contributions.
